arts.ttl: Kris Boyd makes it clear that Kasper Schmeichel is already better than Joe Hart at one thing at Celtic
arts.sum: Kris Boyd says Kasper Schmeichel is better than Joe Hart at playing out from the back at Celtic Joe Hart retired in the summer and it left a big void in between Celtic’s stick, so the next man coming in had to be right.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports host uses Arne Engels to launch Celtic enquiry as Ref Watch panel split over two flashpoints
arts.sum: The £11m Parkhead record signing was the subject of a Var check

arts.ttl: IFAB are trialling a 'very interesting' rule change Celtic's opponents will fear
arts.sum: Celtic fans will like the IFAB trial to stop time-wasting by goalkeepers Nelson told The Times, “The data that’s coming out of it so far is very, very interesting, in that the two trials so far have been that if the goalkeeper is holding on to the ball too long, the referee will award a corner.

arts.ttl: Celtic contact for player can now lead to January transfer – Loan or sale to Bhoys
arts.sum: Celtic attempted to sign Mahamadou Diawara from Lyon in the summer transfer window. The Scottish giants were said to have made an offer for the midfielder as Brendan Rodgers wanted more depth in midfield. The move didn’t go through, as Diawara stayed at Lyon. arts.ttl: Celtic fans 'targeted in Zagreb' as club urge vigilance to supporters ahead of Champions League crunch clash
arts.sum: The Hoops are in Croatia for matchday six of this season's Champions League, but Parkhead chiefs have urged fans to follow advice after incidents already in the city

arts.ttl: Dinamo Zagreb vs Celtic: TV channel, live stream & kick-off time
arts.sum: Dinamo Zagreb vs Celtic: TV channel, live stream & kick-off time.
James Milton assesses all 18 matches in the Champions League this week and delivers a score prediction for every game.

arts.ttl: Luke McCowan nails it when asked a strange question about upcoming League Cup final vs Rangers
arts.sum: So when it comes to results and progress across all competitions, Celtic are completely in the driving seat, especially for the upcoming League Cup final against Rangers on Sunday. With Celtic sitting with a healthy lead at the top of the Scottish Premiership table and on the cusp of qualification from the Champions League, the League Cup final, although it would be great to win, is certainly not a game that is going to define Celtic’s season.

arts.ttl: Celtic show why Brendan Rodgers came back for more as Champions League fear banished by Parkhead favourite
arts.sum: Neil Lennon reckons Celtic's improved showing on the continent is exactly why Rodgers returned as he previews Dinamo clash

arts.ttl: John Souttar flips the Rangers switch as Tottenham task puts Celtic in the shade for now
arts.sum: It's a mega week for the Ibrox club but Souttar knows what's required and more importantly when ahead of two blockbusters
